element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic movement and shooting mechanics established immediately
Simple patterns to learn arcade-style dodging and shooting
Unique weapon power-ups become strategic scoring elements
Bonus points awarded for destruction; may contain power-ups or penalties
Defeat before attack for bonus points; introduces pattern memorization
Risk-reward mechanic: defeat sequences near player ship for score multiplier

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-style constant engagement with wave-based enemy patterns; tension driven by score chase and proximity mechanics rather than narrative pacing

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden destructible tiles containing optional bonuses or power-ups
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Destructible environment tiles reward thorough exploration with bonus points

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic enemy formations introduce core dodging and shooting mechanics; limited threat complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mini-bosses appear; proximity-scoring pressure increases; hidden tile destruction becomes strategic
notable_spikes: Proximity scoring creates risk-reward tension for high scores

notable_level_patterns.description: Continuous scroll shmup with enemy waves approaching from top of screen in recognizable patterns; player must dodge and destroy while managing proximity for score bonuses
Specialized high-score mode where players race through timed stages; emphasis on accumulating points through enemy sequences, hidden tiles, and mini-boss defeats within time constraints
